MODULE: cosmos.integration.video_gen
FILE: cosmos/integration/video_gen.py (152 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Remotion Integration - Programmatic Video Generation.

"Lights, Camera, React!"

Features:
- Automated Project Scaffolding
- Dynamic Props Injection (Text, Images, Data)
- "Shorts" Optimization (9:16)
- Trade Recap Generation

CLASSES:
- RemotionVideoSkill
  Methods: async def init_project(self)
  Methods: async def render_video(self, composition_id: str, props: Dict[str, Any], output_filename: str) -> st
  Methods: async def generate_trade_recap(self, trade_data: Dict) -> str
